title: Vanilla Copper Plus
description: A mod that adds some new copper usages that feel vanilla
body:
**This mod adds the Hamster, Copper Wheel, Copper Generator, Vinegar, Lettuce and a new way to oxidize your copper!**
- The Copper Wheel and Copper Generator are two redstone components that comes with different oxidization level that results in different output powers.
- The Hamster can spawn in all plain and forest biomes as well as hill biomes, it can be tamed and it likes to ride the copper wheel.
- Vinegar can be crafted by using apples and sugar as well as an empty bottle and similar to how water bottles can be placed inside cauldrons, so can vinegar.
- Throwing your copper blocks inside a cauldron filled with vinegar would oxidize them to the next level but it would decrease the level of the vinegar inside the cauldron.
- Lettuce can be found in villages and dungeon chests
- Lettuce can be planted in a similar fashion to carrots and potatoes
- **NOTE: this mod requires geckolib as dependency!**
- **NOTE: Hamster sounds and some of their behavior is based on Star Studios Hamster mod**
